intent: Run a broad repo-wide or PR-wide readiness sweep across multiple quality domains.
shouldTrigger: Run /orbit on this repo and tell me what needs attention.
Is this PR ready overall? Use /orbit pr.
Give me a combined security, tests, and architecture review of this project.
Do a project-wide audit before I open the pull request.
shouldNotTrigger: Security review this one auth handler.
Trace the checkout flow from route to database.
smokeWorkflow: User asks for /orbit pr against the current branch.
Skill gathers the diff, runs the relevant MCP scans in parallel, and deepens only flagged items.
Skill returns one readiness report covering security, tests, code quality, evolution, and rule conformance.

comparisonNotes.withoutSkill: User has to separately ask for security, tests, architecture, and instruction conformance, then manually combine the results.
comparisonNotes.withSkill: A single command produces a unified readiness report with cross-cutting findings and a verdict.
